(View all purchases)

testcase.name: calcAveragePctCompleted > returns the rounded average percent for attempted or graded sections
calcAveragePctCompleted > returns em dash if there are no valid attempted or graded sections
calcAveragePctCompleted > returns em dash if the input is not an array
getInvoiceName > returns the correct course title for a given invoice number
getInvoiceName > returns fallback text if no course title is found
getCourseImage > returns the correct image for the corresponding abbreviation
getCourseImage > returns null if no abbreviation matches
getCourseCompletion > returns 60 if 3 out of 5 sections are completed
getCourseCompletion > returns 0 if there are no completed sections
getCourseCompletion > returns 0 if there are no sections
getMappedChapters > sorts chapters by ordinal and maps display values correctly
getMappedChapters > uses fallback values when chapter data is missing
App > mounts renders properly

testcase.name: CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > shows loading state while certificates are fetching
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > renders only completed CR-graded certificates
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > renders certificate titles correctly
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > does NOT render incomplete/non-CR courses as certificates
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > shows empty state message when no completed certificates exist
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > shows error message if certificates API fails
testcase.system-err: Not implemented: Window's alert() method

testcase.name: CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > filters certificates as user types in search box
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > shows no-match message when search returns no results
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > shows all certificates when search is cleared
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > renders a Download Certificate button for each certificate
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > download button is enabled by default
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > renders CEU and contact hours chips from enrollment record
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > renders a router-link to /messages
CertificatesPage — Integration Tests > renders a router-link to /purchase-history
filterCertificates > returns all certificates when search query is empty
filterCertificates > returns all certificates when search query is only whitespace
filterCertificates > filters certificates by partial title match (case-insensitive)
filterCertificates > filters certificates by specific title keyword
filterCertificates > is case-insensitive when filtering
filterCertificates > returns empty array when no certificates match query
filterCertificates > returns empty array when certificates list is empty
filterCertificates > trims whitespace from search query before filtering
formatCeu > formats a valid number to one decimal place
formatCeu > returns "—" for null
formatCeu > returns "—" for undefined
formatCeu > returns "—" for a non-numeric string
formatCeu > parses a numeric string correctly
buildSafeFilename > replaces spaces with underscores
buildSafeFilename > replaces special characters with underscores
buildSafeFilename > collapses multiple consecutive underscores into one
buildSafeFilename > truncates to 40 characters
buildSafeFilename > returns empty string for empty input
CompletedCourse > loads and displays completed course summary information correctly
CompletedCourse > falls back to gradeAverage when record grade is missing
CompletedCourse > loads and displays chapter progress correctly
CompletedCourse > displays purchase history correctly
CompletedCourse > shows empty chapter state when no chapter data exists
CompletedCourse > shows error state when enrollment record fails to load

testcase.name: calcAveragePctCompleted > returns the rounded average percent for attempted or graded sections
calcAveragePctCompleted > returns em dash if there are no valid attempted or graded sections
getInvoiceName > returns the correct course title for a given invoice number
getInvoiceName > returns fallback text if no course title is found
getCourseImage > returns the correct image for the corresponding abbreviation
getCourseImage > returns null if no abbreviation matches
getCourseCompletion > returns 60 if 3 out of 5 sections are completed
getCourseCompletion > returns 100 if there are no sections
getFormattedCeus > returns CEUs formatted to one decimal place
getFormattedCeus > returns em dash when CEUs are invalid
getMappedChapters > sorts chapters by ordinal and maps display values correctly
getMappedChapters > uses fallback values when chapter data is missing
getFinalCourseGrade > uses gradeAverage when courseGrade is em dash
getFinalCourseGrade > keeps the original courseGrade when it exists
CoursesPage > loads and displays active enrollments correctly
CoursesPage > shows empty state when no active enrollments exist
CoursesPage > loads and displays completed enrollments correctly
CoursesPage > shows empty state when no completed enrollments exist
CoursesPage > shows empty state for recommended courses
CoursesPage > loads and displays purchase history correctly
CoursesPage > shows empty state when no purchase history exists
CoursesPage > shows empty state for messages
getInvoiceName > returns the correct course title for a given invoice number
getInvoiceName > returns fallback text if no course title is found
getCourseImage > returns the correct image for the corresponding abbreviation
getCourseImage > returns null if no abbreviation matches
getActiveEnrollments > filters only enrollments with statustxt "Enrolled"
getActiveEnrollments > returns an empty array if no enrollments are active
getCompletedEnrollments > filters only enrollments with statustxt "Complete" or "Dropped"
getCompletedEnrollments > returns an empty array if no enrollments are completed or dropped
getCourseProgress > returns 60% if 3 out of 5 sections are graded
getCourseProgress > returns 0% if no sections are graded
getCourseProgress > returns 0% if there are no sections
getCompletedCourseStatus > returns Pass when grade is CR
getCompletedCourseStatus > returns Fail when grade is not CR
getCompletedCourseStatus > returns dropped state when statustxt is Dropped

getCourseImage > returns null if no abbreviation matches
getCourseCompletion > returns 60% if 3 out of 5 sections are completed
getCourseCompletion > returns 0% if no sections are completed

getInvoiceName > returns an error message if no course title is found for the given invoice number

testcase.name: MyAccountPage > loads and displays firstname in the profile card
MyAccountPage > loads email and address in contact info
MyAccountPage > loads operator numbers
MyAccountPage > loads transcript preview from CR grade enrollments only
MyAccountPage > loads purchase history preview with invoice titles
MyAccountPage > opens contact dialog and pre-fills contact fields
MyAccountPage > formats phone input as the user types
MyAccountPage > saveContactInfo sends parsed phone data to updateContactInfo
MyAccountPage > shows loading fallback when operator list is empty
MyAccountPage > shows transcript empty state when no transcript items are available
MyAccountPage > shows purchase history empty state when there are no invoices
MyAccountPage > falls back to cached account data when account request fails
MyAccountPage > falls back to cached operator list when operator request fails
MyAccountPage > falls back to cached invoices and invoice data when purchase history requests fail
MyAccountPage > uses loading placeholders when account request fails and no cache exists
addressLine2 > formats city, state, and zip correctly
addressLine2 > omits blank/null values safely
addressLine2 > returns empty string when all values are missing
digitsOnly > removes all non-digit characters
digitsOnly > returns empty string for nullish input
formatPhoneDisplay > formats a full 10-digit phone number
formatPhoneDisplay > formats partial phone input
formatPhoneDisplay > returns empty string for empty input
splitPhoneFromDisplay > extracts area code and local number from a formatted phone number
splitPhoneFromDisplay > returns only area when input is incomplete
splitPhoneFromDisplay > returns null values when no digits exist
getTranscriptItems > returns only Complete and Dropped enrollments, max 2
getTranscriptItems > uses fallback title when title is missing
getInvoiceName > returns the first non-null course title for an invoice
getInvoiceName > returns fallback text when invoice has no course title

- Expected + Received
- Failed to load invoices + Purchase History View your invoices and payment details for your purchases. [vitest] No "loadFromSession" export is defined on the "@/services/owpAPI" mock. Did you forget to return it from "vi.mock"? + If you need to partially mock a module, you can use "importOriginal" helper inside:
❯ src/__tests__/PurchaseHistoryPage.spec.js:68:28

testcase.name: getInvoiceName > returns the correct course title for a given invoice number
getInvoiceName > returns fallback text if no course title is found
getRecommendedCourseState > returns the selected recommended course data when a matching id exists
getRecommendedCourseState > returns fallback empty state when no matching course exists
getRecommendedCourseState > uses fallback chapter content when a course has no chapters
getRecommendedCourseState > uses fallback text for missing description fields
getRecommendedCourseState > uses fallback title text when the course title is missing
